reviewResult: suitable to present for explicit user approval in a later sprint
originalDraftRevisionsAddressed: explicitly exclude unknown management state targets
explicitly exclude targets requiring script or Lua execution
explicitly require restored byte and scalar-value verification
present future gate flips as staged rather than simultaneous
allowedTargetClass: one existing non-high-risk scalar line in one normal config file with exact line number and no ambiguity
excludedTargetClasses: targets requiring script or Lua execution
backupVerificationRecoveryRequirements: backup byte equality proof before write
restore exact backup bytes on write failure after backup
restore exact backup bytes on verification failure
verify restored bytes and restored scalar value
report recovery failure without hiding backup path
applyIntegrationScope: session-selected config does not automatically affect writes
real write target must be normal scalar file occurrence
backup, verification, and recovery must wrap any write
errors must block write or report failure safely
